overall.description: First-person exploration of the Ravenclaw common room from Hogwarts Legacy, featuring entry through the eagle-adorned door, ascent of the spiral staircase past the Rowena Ravenclaw statue, and exploration of the main lounge with its distinctive blue and bronze decor before exiting through a rear archway.

events.description: eagle door opens revealing the entry hall

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering through the large eagle-adorned wooden door

notable_agents.action: two students in robes standing at the base of the wall eagle sculpture

entered.detail: large wooden door with golden eagle knocker that opens inward
massive stone eagle sculpture spanning the wall above the inner stairs
short flight of stone steps leading up from the entrance
dark wooden handrails flanking the entry stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins outside the golden eagle door which opens to reveal a narrow stone entry hall. A massive wall-mounted eagle sculpture dominates the far wall above a short staircase, with two students standing at its base observing the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved spiral staircase with tall windows

events.description: begins ascending the spiral staircase leaving the entry hall

agents.ego_description: walking up the spiral staircase with blue carpet runner

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: curved stone staircase with blue carpet runner winding upward
tall arched windows with diamond lattice panes letting in natural light
rough-hewn stone blocks forming the curved wall of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the spiral staircase with blue carpet runner, passing tall gothic windows on the left that cast natural light onto the stone walls. A student descends the stairs in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: statue landing at top of stairs

events.description: reaches the top of the spiral staircase and levels out
passes through archway into the main common room

agents.ego_description: approaching and examining the Rowena Ravenclaw statue before entering the common room

notable_agents.action: student walking past the statue in the background

entered.detail: tall marble statue of a robed woman holding a wand in a stone niche
large ornate ceramic urns on pedestals flanking the statue niche
arched doorway leading into the main common room area

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the camera approaches the marble statue of Rowena Ravenclaw set in a stone niche with decorative urns. After pausing to view the statue, the camera moves through an archway into the main common room.

events.description: moves into brighter area near the large windows and central fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room observing the furniture and other students

notable_agents.action: two students in conversation standing near the railing

entered.detail: blue carpet with gold star and celestial patterns covering the floor
tall pointed arch windows with intricate tracery along the walls
large ornate fireplace with wooden mantelpiece in the center of the room
blue upholstered armchairs and wooden tables arranged in seating groups

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the spacious common room with its distinctive blue star-patterned carpet and high vaulted ceilings. Gothic windows line the walls allowing natural light to illuminate the space. Students are scattered throughout, some sitting in the blue armchairs while others walk about. The camera moves toward the central fireplace area.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room rear area with trophy cabinet and bookshelves

events.description: moves from carpeted area to wooden floor section near the rear archway

agents.ego_description: examining the trophy cabinet and bookshelves before heading toward the exit archway

entered.detail: tall white wooden display case with glass doors showing silver trophies and books
floor-to-ceiling wooden bookshelves filled with leather-bound volumes
large dark wall hanging with silver eagle embroidery
arched exit flanked by suits of armor and leading to wooden staircases

segments.scene_description: Moving through the rear of the common room, the camera passes a white trophy cabinet filled with silver cups and tall bookshelves lining the walls. An eagle tapestry hangs on the far wall above the exit archway, which is guarded by suits of armor and leads to wooden staircases.

events.description: exits the common room through the archway and begins ascending wooden stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden staircase past framed portraits on the walls

entered.detail: steep wooden stairs with carved railings ascending from the common room
oil paintings in gold frames hanging on the stone walls
full plate armor holding a halberd standing guard at the stair base

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the common room through the rear archway, passing between suits of armor, and ascends a narrow wooden staircase. The stone walls are lined with framed portraits in the style of moving paintings, leading up to a door at the top of the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow stone entryway into the expansive, airy heights of the Ravenclaw common room and beyond. It begins by passing through a golden eagle door into a stone hall dominated by a massive eagle sculpture, before ascending a blue-carpeted spiral staircase illuminated by tall gothic windows. As the camera reaches the top, it pauses briefly at a marble statue of Rowena Ravenclaw before gliding through an archway into a spacious lounge characterized by vaulted ceilings and blue star-patterned carpets. The scene then shifts toward the rear of the room, passing trophy cabinets and bookshelves until it reaches an eagle tapestry hanging above the exit. Finally, the camera moves between suits of armor and climbs a narrow wooden staircase lined with moving portraits, leading toward a door at the top of the flight.
